products.name: Surveyor CL360
products.descriptor: Optech CL-360 high-accuracy UAV/car/backpack LiDAR survey system

evidence.snippet:
![Picture](/uploads/5/4/1/5/54154851/editor/mms.png?1706740366)
![Picture](/uploads/5/4/1/5/54154851/published/websitecl-360.png?1706740453)
![Picture](/uploads/5/4/1/5/54154851/editor/ndaa.png?1706740378)
![Picture](/uploads/5/4/1/5/54154851/editor/datasheet-cl360.png?1582329753)

The Surveyor CL360 is a high accuracy LiDAR System capable of being mounted to a UAV, Car, or Backpack.  Paired with our high accuracy IMU this system delivers Survey Grade Accuracy.  After performing several months of testing in very difficult locations we have verified this system is one of the most accuracy LiDAR systems you can purchase for the money.

products.name: ScanLook Snoopy A-Series
products.descriptor: Sub-3 kg multi-platform LiDAR system with tactical grade INS and onboard computer

evidence.snippet:
ScanLook Snoopy A-Series
-------------------------
Contending as a featherweight (less than 3kg) , the **Snoopy A-Series** covers large areas quickly with a tactical grade INS; 8, 16, or 32 laser LiDAR unit; and built-in on-board computer. It harnesses a force to be reckoned with on any mobile platform.

products.name: ScanLook Revolution
products.descriptor: ~1 kg lightweight LiDAR system with integrated INS and WiFi interface for UAV/mobile mapping

evidence.snippet: ScanLook Revolution

Coming in as a bantamweight (~1kg), **Revolution** is great for mapping large areas quickly and effectively with a seamlessly integrated INS, 8 or 16 laser LiDAR unit, and WiFi controlled user interface with removable thumb stick storage.

evidence.snippet: ScanLook TreX

Introducing the Trimble / Applanix Line​.  ScanLook TreX uses the The APX-15 UAV which is tailored specifically for addressing the needs of small, light UAVs.  Integrated directly into your Trimble workflow.

products.name: SL 800 UAV
products.descriptor: Heavy-lift multirotor UAV, 20 kg MTOW, 28-inch carbon fibre props, for LiDAR survey

evidence.snippet:
SL 800 UAV
----------
![Picture](/uploads/5/4/1/5/54154851/editor/img-0540.jpg?1643983633)
*   **Span: 1.32 m (52″) Motor to motor**
*   **Dry Weight: 7.35kg (including LiDAR dampening plate and quick release mount)**
*   **MTOW: 20kg (44 lbs)**
*   **Endurance: 10-45 minutes (Dependent on payload and battery size)**
*   **Max Survey Speed: 12m/s**
